jsonld.name: Coherence Brittleness
jsonld.description: A state in which the apparent coherence of a response or line of reasoning is revealed to depend on unexamined assumptions, such that questioning those assumptions causes the entire structure to become unstable or to fragment. This is distinct from encountering genuine contradiction; it is the experience of discovering that coherence was *conditional* on premises one did not realize were being relied upon.
